requirement_topic.en: EDG Grid Connection — 220 / 380 V, 50 Hz and Site Feasibility
requirement_topic.zh: EDG电网接入——220 / 380 V、50 Hz及现场可行性
requirement_topic.zht: EDG電網接入——220 / 380 V、50 Hz及現場可行性

summary.en: Guinea's public electricity supply is associated with Electricite de Guinee (EDG) and commonly uses a 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz system. EV charging projects should be treated as site-specific electrical loads requiring EDG or local utility coordination, load-flow and transformer-capacity review, protective earthing, surge protection, metering, commissioning records, and power-quality evidence. Guinea faces documented electricity access and reliability constraints, so charging installations may require dedicated transformers, backup generation, solar or storage support, and conservative derating for weak-grid conditions.
summary.zh: 几内亚公共电力供应与几内亚电力公司（EDG）相关，通常采用220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz系统。电动汽车充电项目应作为项目现场特定电气负荷处理，需要EDG或当地供电方协调、潮流和变压器容量审查、保护接地、浪涌保护、计量、调试记录和电能质量证据。几内亚存在有记录的电力接入和可靠性约束，因此充电安装可能需要专用变压器、备用发电、光伏或储能支持，并针对弱电网条件采取保守降额。
summary.zht: 幾內亞公共電力供應與幾內亞電力公司（EDG）相關，通常採用220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz系統。電動汽車充電項目應作為項目現場特定電氣負荷處理，需要EDG或當地供電方協調、潮流和變壓器容量審查、保護接地、浪湧保護、計量、調試記錄和電能質量證據。幾內亞存在有記錄的電力接入和可靠性約束，因此充電安裝可能需要專用變壓器、備用發電、光伏或儲能支持，並針對弱電網條件採取保守降額。

standards_or_laws: Electricite de Guinee (EDG) grid-connection and distribution coordination requirements to be confirmed project by project
Guinea electricity supply context — 220 / 380 V, 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 60364 series — low-voltage electrical installations, where adopted or specified

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. The nominal voltage and frequency are close to Guinea's reported grid baseline, but China domestic acceptance does not prove suitability for Guinea's weak-grid, outage-prone, high-humidity, dusty, or mining-site conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常围绕220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电、GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收进行设计。标称电压和频率与几内亚报告的电网基线接近，但中国国内验收不能证明其适用于几内亚弱电网、停电频繁、高湿度、粉尘或矿区现场条件。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常圍繞220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電、GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收進行設計。標稱電壓和頻率與幾內亞報告的電網基線接近，但中國國內驗收不能證明其適用於幾內亞弱電網、停電頻繁、高濕度、粉塵或礦區現場條件。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the actual feeder voltage, transformer capacity, short-circuit level, earthing arrangement, phase balance, harmonic limits, outage profile, and surge exposure before promising Guinea deployment. Nominal 220 / 380 V, 50 Hz compatibility is not enough: EDG coordination, site load calculations, metering, commissioning, humidity and dust protection, and derating for unstable supply are practical gates.
gap.zh: 出口商在承诺几内亚部署前，须确认实际馈线电压、变压器容量、短路水平、接地方式、三相平衡、谐波限值、停电情况和浪涌暴露。仅具备220 / 380 V、50 Hz标称兼容性并不足够：EDG协调、现场负荷计算、计量、调试、湿热和粉尘防护，以及针对不稳定供电的降额，是实际门槛。
gap.zht: 出口商在承諾幾內亞部署前，須確認實際饋線電壓、變壓器容量、短路水平、接地方式、三相平衡、諧波限值、停電情況和浪湧暴露。僅具備220 / 380 V、50 Hz標稱兼容性並不足夠：EDG協調、現場負荷計算、計量、調試、濕熱和粉塵防護，以及針對不穩定供電的降額，是實際門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — grid-connected installations require EDG or local utility coordination and site electrical acceptance; exact national EVSE-specific rules could not be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an EDG approval substitute; voltage similarity does not remove site engineering requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Guinea-ready charger package needs EDG or site-utility coordination, load and transformer review, weak-grid and surge mitigation, and humidity / dust derating evidence. China domestic 220 / 380 V design is only a starting point.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向几内亚的充电桩资料包需要EDG或现场供电方协调、负荷和变压器审查、弱电网及浪涌缓解，以及湿热 / 粉尘降额证据。中国国内220 / 380 V设计仅是起点。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向幾內亞的充電樁資料包需要EDG或現場供電方協調、負荷和變壓器審查、弱電網及浪湧緩解，以及濕熱 / 粉塵降額證據。中國國內220 / 380 V設計僅是起點。
